---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: sanchez314c
---

## What do you want?

A clear description of the feature.

## Why do you want it?

Describe the use case. What problem does this solve?

## How it could work

Your ideas on how this could be implemented. Not required, but helpful.

## Alternatives

Other ways to solve the problem, or workarounds you've tried.

## Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important for my workflow
- [ ] Blocking me from using the app
